title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
